title: Senior Frontend Developer
description: Novify is partnering with a decentralized exchange to build an AI-native trading platform. The product is a conversational, mobile-first trading interface spanning crypto, equities, and more. This role leads development of elegant, secure, high-performance web interfaces for advanced trading features.
responsibilities: Build fast, modern interfaces for advanced trading
Collaborate with design and backend teams for seamless user flows
requirements: 3+ years with NextJS and isomorphic rendering
Bonus: Blockchain app or API design familiarity

contact.name: Angelica Ortega
contact.title: Founder | Web3 | Team Architect | Startups | Psychologist

notes: Zero-to-one product with AI focus. Strong match for React/Next/Tailwind skills. Web3 bonus optional. Design-forward, remote role. Easy Apply via LinkedIn.
